articles.title: Deadly car bomb attack hits checkpoint in northwest Pakistan
articles.summary: A suspected car bombing followed by a firefight at a police checkpoint has killed more than a dozen people in Bannu.

articles.title: Iran war day 72: Tehran yet to reply to US plan; Israel bombs Lebanon
articles.summary: Israel kills at least 24 people in Lebanon in one day as Tehran's response to US proposal to end the war is awaited.

articles.title: Flotilla activists arrive in Turkiye before setting sail to Gaza
articles.summary: Over 30 Global Sumud Flotilla vessels have reached Marmaris on Turkiye’s coast, preparing for their mission to Gaza.

articles.title: Flotilla activist gives defiant message after Israel deports him to Greece
articles.summary: After a week in Israeli custody, flotilla activist Saif Abu Keshek has been deported to Greece.

articles.title: Sabalenka out of Italian Open amid injury concerns for Roland Garros
articles.summary: ⁠Sorana Cirstea defeated world's top women's player 2-6, 6-3, 7-5 in the third round as she suffered pain in lower back.

articles.title: Israel deports two Gaza aid flotilla activists
articles.summary: The pair was abducted by Israeli forces from the aid flotilla in late April and held in Israel.

articles.title: Cruise ship hit by hantavirus outbreak arrives in Tenerife
articles.summary: Hantavirus is usually spread by rodents but can in rare cases be transmitted person to person.

articles.title: Strickland vs Chimaev – UFC 328: Strickland downs Chimaev on split decision
articles.summary: Sean Strickland won 48–47, 48–47 and 47–48 against Khamzat Chimaev in a fight that failed to live up to its hype.

articles.title: Dubois stops Wardley in 11th round to take WBO heavyweight boxing title
articles.summary: Daniel Dubois recovered from two knockdowns to win a second World Heavyweight title with a stoppage of Fabio Wardley.

articles.title: Macron tours East Africa amid push to redefine France’s role in Africa
articles.summary: Paris seeks to repair economic and security ties while countering rising anti-French sentiment across Africa.

articles.title: Two wins, two losses: What India, Pakistan have learned a year after war
articles.summary: India and Pakistan each claim strategic successes after the four-day conflict, as tensions continue to simmer.

articles.title: Person dies after being hit by plane at Denver airport
articles.summary: A Frontier Airlines plane has hit and killed a person at Denver’s international airport.

articles.title: Putin suggests Russia’s war on Ukraine ‘coming to an end’
articles.summary: Russian president also says he is willing to meet Zelenskyy in a third country if a long-term peace deal is reached.

articles.title: ‘No Kings’ protest outside Buckingham Palace
articles.summary: British anti-royals have staged a ‘No Kings’ protest outside Buckingham Palace in London.

articles.title: Satellite images show likely oil slick off Iran’s Kharg Island
articles.summary: Satellite images have captured a suspected oil slick spanning dozens of square kilometres near Iran’s Kharg Island.

articles.title: Iran war live: IRGC warns US against attacks on ships; Israel bombs Lebanon
articles.summary: US-Iran ceasefire holds as Tehran warns Washington against attacks on tankers and Israel kills 24 people in Lebanon.

articles.title: WHO chief says Hantavirus outbreak ‘is not COVID’
articles.summary: WHO chief says Hantavirus outbreak ‘is not COVID’

articles.title: Brazil judge bars law that could reduce Bolsonaro’s 27-year prison sentence
articles.summary: Supreme Court Justice Alexandre de Moraes suspends use of law to reduce prison sentences, pending further review.

articles.title: One killed in Gaza as Turkish FM talks peace efforts with Hamas official
articles.summary: Israel continues to violate a 'ceasefire' agreed to in October with hundreds more killed across the Strip.

articles.title: For the first time, Putin says he’s open to meeting Zelensky outside Russia
articles.summary: Vladimir Putin changes tone, says for first time he will meet Zelenskyy in a third nation.

articles.title: Palestinian family says settlers forced them to exhume father’s body
articles.summary: A Palestinian family in Jenin says Israeli settlers forced them to exhume their father hours after his funeral.

articles.title: Car bomb attack and ambush in northwest Pakistan kills at least 12 police
articles.summary: Bomber and several fighters detonate explosives-laden vehicle near security post in Bannu, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa.

articles.title: Should we be worried about the hantavirus outbreak?
articles.summary: The incident has drawn comparisons to the COVID-19 pandemic.

articles.title: Venezuela’s Delcy Rodriguez heads to The Hague for land dispute case
articles.summary: Trip to be first time Rodriguez has left Caribbean since Maduro abduction, will attend ICJ case on Guyana land dispute.

articles.title: Israeli settlers force Palestinian family to exhume and rebury their father
articles.summary: UN condemns confrontation in occupied West Bank as 'appalling and emblematic of the dehumanisation of Palestinians'.
